## The methodology: a legacy

- Methodology is not new
- Automatic coding for difficult cases and manuel check for the easiest one
- Coding systems since 1981 ! 🧙🏻‍♂️

## The shock

- data not clean anymore 
➡️ Teams got [**overwhelmed**]{.blue2}
- automation drops to 30%

 <details> 
  <summary> 
      <font size=3 color=black><b>Display an exemple of activity description from business formality centers</b></font> 
  </summary>

  ```
  BAKERY
  ```
</details> 

<details> 
  <summary> 
      <font size=3 color=black><b>Display an exemple of activity description from the one-stop-shop</b></font> 
  </summary>

  ```
 I am looking to developpe in the cleaning and maintainance of busines offices: changeing bins, vacuuming, and mopping
  ```
</details>
